programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora intimida a su prisionero, quiere que la ame a la fuerza, le dice que ella es mucho más mujer que Norma. Gabriela desea que Juan aparezca para que su hija se case y deje de sufrir.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora y su familia van a la hacienda Elizondo, Norma lo toma como una provocación. Los matones le aseguran a su patrona que Juan es un hombre fuerte y difícil, pero ella los amenaza.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan le dice a Dínora que está dispuesto a rogar con tal de obtener su libertad, ella no le cree. Hortencia ve a Ruth, piensa que es Libia, corre y da gritos, en el pueblo piensan que enloqueció.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Ruth sueña que Libia le muestra la cabaña donde tienen a Juan, sale a buscar el lugar, los hombres de Dínora la atrapan en el momento en que están cavando una tumba para enterrarlo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Ruth y Juan toman a Dínora de rehén y huyen, pero son recapturados y llevados a la montaña para matarlos, sus hermanos merodean por los alrededores. Rosario y Armando tienen un duelo a tiros.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Armando llega al hospital con un balazo en el pecho, mientras Juan y Ruth hacen el último esfuerzo por sobrevivir. Antes de huir, Dínora llama a Norma para decirle que Juan no regresará jamás.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Una caravana de rescate recorre el territorio en medio de la noche, las sospechas de que Dínora es la culpable del secuestro son corroboradas al hallar a Juan y a Ruth en un camino solitario.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: En una fiesta de bienvenida en la hacienda de los Reyes, Juan revela sus temores sobre algo terrible relacionado con Dínora. Fernando no se salva de la furia de las hermanas Elizondo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: La policía inspecciona con Juan y el papá de Dínora el lugar del cautiverio, donde unas osamentas crean sospechas de posibles crímenes. Franco ve a Sara golpeada y quiere vengarse de Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela castiga a Sara a latigazos al hallarla con Franco en la cabaña, Norma y Jimena encaran de nuevo a Fernando, quien amenaza con irse, pero Gabriela lo detiene, él le hace una propuesta.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela le informa a la familia que Fernando será algo más que el administrador de la hacienda. Sara le confiesa a Martín que está enamorada de Franco y Ruth indaga quiénes son sus padres.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Nuevos sentimientos cambian la vida de Gabriela, sus hijas no la recordaban así desde antes de la muerte de su padre, temen de las intenciones ocultas de Fernando y buscan apoyo en los Reyes.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Las Elizondo saben que se avecina un inminente peligro y que no pueden marcharse de la hacienda a pesar de la nueva actitud de su madre, quien después de su boda luce 20 años más joven.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela se esmera en los arreglos de la hacienda, sus hijas presumen que siempre estuvo enamorada. Fernando asiste a una despedida de solteros con mujerzuelas, que le organiza Armando.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams make their way to Panama City, where they come face-to-face with their fears as they take in astonishing views of the city skyline.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: After racing through 4 continents, 20 cities and nearly 40,000 miles, the final three teams race to Atlanta, Ga., where a smooth landing evades one team as their competition soars.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: As 11 Teams depart Santa Barbara, Calif. for Santa Barbara, Argentina, one team struggles to keep their nerves at bay. Meanwhile, Teams quickly discover winning $1 million may be tougher than expected when they find themselves skydiving at 10,000 feet.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Buenos Aires, Argentina, where the stress of the Race causes one Team to break down into tears. Meanwhile, chaos ensues when Racers are required to sharpen their numerical skills at the world's largest cattle market.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Race travels to Paraguay for the first time ever, as Teams struggle to produce during a fruity challenge, and Racers face a harsh reality if they fail to perfect a local balancing act.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: An unexpected beheading occurs as teams polish off a dirty task, and a random act of kindness leaves one team in tears.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams scour King Ludwig's quarters in the same castle that served as the inspiration for Sleeping Beauty's castle, and tempers flare during one Team's walk through a snowy labyrinth.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Two Teams hit the hay to see how well they stack up and Racers break out the sponges for an oily detour during the series first ever trip to Azerbaijan.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Tears are shed as the claws come out in Tanzania and racers stand in amazement as they train alongside the Masai warriors.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Race takes an unexpected turn when an early alliance is betrayed, and an unforgiving team savors the opportunity to exact their revenge in a game twist.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Gender disparities cause one Team to lose faith when a challenge seems insurmountable, and emotions run high as a Racer must weigh their own well-being against their future in the game.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One determined Racer powers through pain in the wake of a physical misstep, and teams pull out all of the bells and whistles for a larger than life challenge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four Teams battle for the $1 million prize in a grueling two-hour season finale that starts in Japan, where Racers call upon their track skills for an exhausting Japanese game show, and concludes in Hawaii.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife plays cupid for Gomer when Barney's girl refuses to go to a dance unless her cousin also has a date.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney is evicted from his rooming house for illegal cooking and moves into the Mayberry sheriff's office backroom much to Andy's chagrin.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney tickets Gomer for a U-turn and is then detained in a citizen's arrest by Gomer for the same thing.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie and his chums take their roles as Robin Hood and his merry men seriously as they befriend a hobo at the expense of the pantries of Mayberry.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney organizes a rescue party when Andy and Helen are trapped in a cave by a landslide.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie learns a lesson in friendship when he befriends a newcomer to Mayberry.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee stirs up a crusade for a chicken farmer whose property has been condemned to make way for a new road.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney adds a vintage motorcycle to the rolling stock of the Mayberry Sheriff's department, to the Sheriff's regret.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ernest T. Bass is a would-be Romeo, who is brought into the sheriff's home in an effort to teach him some manners.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A beautiful prisoner threatens to crumble the security of the Mayberry jail, as both Andy and Barney fall for her charms.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Otis Campbell acquires a car and threatens life and limb of Mayberry's pedestrian population.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney suffers an ego blow when Gomer out-sings him for a part in the Mayberry Choir. Andy Griffith's wife, Barbara, appears in this episode as a member of the singing group.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney disguises himself as a dummy in an attempt to solve a series of theft at the Mayberry department store.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy takes a week off, leaving Barney and Gomer in charge. A prisoner also takes off in the resultant confusion.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Gomer falls asleep on the job and Andy douses a fire to save his life. Gomer becomes a menace trying to repay the favor.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee saves money by buying a side of beef. The beef is tough, the freezer conks out, and Gomer attempts to fix the motor.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A strange mountain-style divorce ritual is frustrated by another ritual performed by Barney.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Opie gets caught in a scheme to sell a useless product, Barney and Gomer come to his rescue.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Joyce Jameson and Jean Carson appear as two fun-loving blondes who upset the sheriff's office.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: British comedian Bernard Fox plays an Englishman who returns to Mayberry and upsets Aunt Bee with his efficiency.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney interprets a kiss as a sign of a secret engagement between Andy and Helen. The town gets the word and prepares a surprise party for the couple.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: From the far reaches of the beautiful Samburu lands in Northern Kenya, come along with Jack for an unforgettable elephant adventure, with legendary Save the Elephants founder Iain Douglas Hamilton.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack boards a submarine heading deep into the waters of Curacao, uncovering everything from lionfish to newly discovered species. Then Jack and the team from the Columbus Zoo work to rehabilitate coral reefs by planting baby coral in the ocean.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his grandson as they journey to the lush jungles of Lake Manyara National Park in Tanzania. They encounter an elephant roadblock, migrating pelicans, baboons, hippos, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Big Green Eating Machines
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for a massive countdown filled with the planet’s most voracious vegetarians like elephants, hippos, rhinos and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Take a trip with Jack and the Hanna family to Bruny Island in Tasmania. See an all-white wallaby, watch wild fur seals at play and go on a thrilling boat ride on the Tasman Sea that ends with a surprise dolphin encounter.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: From the loveable Koala to the feisty Tasmanian Devil, this adventure to the other side of the world uncovers some of the most unique animals on the planet. Plus Jack and his family get a special tour of the Australia Zoo from the Irwin family.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Habitats High & Low
programme.desc: Come along on today’s adventure to Australia’s Great Barrier Reef, Kenya’s Masai Mara, Panama’s Forest Canopy and many more amazing animal ecosystems, as Jack counts them down all the way to number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jack and Suzi as they meet some mighty meerkats living in California's desert, and visit a wolf sanctuary dedicated to saving the misunderstood species.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack goes to work behind the scenes at the world-renowned Ann van Dyk Cheetah Center in South Africa where over 800 Cheetah cubs have been bred in the last 40 years. Jack also comes face-to-face with rare African Wild Dogs.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Take a peek behind-the-scenes of some massive animal transport operations, all to help animals in need, like bringing a gorilla to his doctor’s appointment, herding blesbok to food-filled savannahs and many more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Tree for Me
programme.desc: The sky’s the limit on today’s countdown. Tigers, orangutans, leopards, monkeys and more! Find out which high-flying animal is number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack travels to exotic Singapore for an adventure filled with some of the most fascinating creatures in the world.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jack and his family as they immerse themselves in the jungles of Peru.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is headed to South Africa to explore one of the most ground-breaking reserves on the continent – Shamwari. What once was old farming land, is now a meticulously restored eco-system brimming with wildlife and adventure.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Sue meet up with renowned conservationists Chryssee and Esmond Bradley Martin in Kenya and see hyenas, warthogs, and even a cheetah, before searching for white rhinos in Nairobi National Park.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack for all-canine countdown. Meet working dogs on patrol to save rhinos and find lost hikers, get a look at rare populations of African wild dogs, and meet some amazing dogs that provide love and companionship.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jack is exploring life below the surface with a dive down to Australia’s Great Barrier Reef, a submarine safari in the Cayman Islands, a highly classified mission with a sea lion, and lots of sharks.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Far Out Sightings
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for some super rare animal sightings. A lake-loving elephant, desert-dwelling flamingos, goats enjoying island life, zebras in California and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Most baby animals are adorable, but only a select few get to be called “cubs.” Come along with Jungle Jack as he counts down some cute and cuddly cubs, like lions, cheetahs, bears and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is eager to spot the animals on today’s countdown! Cheetah, painted dog, giraffe, a baby tapir and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Ever wonder what Jack's favorite animal encounters have been? Get ready to dive with the great white and meet it face-to-face. It's all part of the fun when Jack chooses his favorites on the next Animal Adventures!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and his family travel into the mountain gorillas' homeland, deep in the jungles of Rwanda's Volcanoes National Park. With only 700 of these great apes left in the wild, they learn first-hand what's being done to save the gentle giants.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is in Malaysia getting a little closer than he would like to lots and lots of crocodiles! Then he has an unforgettable encounter with a King Cobra before trekking up into Batu Caves just outside of Kuala Lampur.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack for an adventure to the Loggerhead Marinelife Center in Juno Beach, Florida where conservationists are working to save endangered sea turtles.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: The animals on today’s show like to stick together. Join Jungle Jack as he counts down the planet’s party animals, like baboons, buffalos, flamingos, painted dogs, and more wildebeest than you can imagine!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In southern Brazil, Jack and Kathaleen boat up a raging river to Iguassu Falls, the world's largest. At the base of the falls, dad and daughter marvel at the unusual nesting site for thousands of Swifts.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack travels to Rwanda where he meets up with some old friends and makes some new ones. Join Jack and his family as they encounter extremely rare golden monkeys while trekking through the jungle in search of endangered mountain gorillas.

programme.desc: An American woman pretends to be Swedish when she meets an executive who's searching for a company spokesperson. Meanwhile, a woman mistakenly believes a man has undergone a sex change.

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A stiff British ex-military officer is put in charge of the fun-loving and energy-filled Menudo group; a young couple is confouded because Doc seems very much in love with his visiting ex-wife, a fact Doc attributes to the fact that he is divorced.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A hurricane devastates the tropical island where a shore party of Capt. Stubing, his crew members, and passengers are held captive by a strange hermit while the Pacific Princess totters under the command of a bumbling deputy captain.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: In Part 2, the captain and crew are still marooned.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Julie's parents arrive on board the Pacific Princess and announce their plans to divorce.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A man makes a move on three women; not knowing that they are traveling companions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Entomology: Bugs have roamed the earth for 250 million years, but their intimate association with death is just now coming to life.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators are always on the cutting edge of new forensic techniques that can help them solve cases more accurately. An experimental “brain fingerprinting” technique has already won the acquittal of a police officer accused of a drug charge.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a victim is gunned down at point-blank range, police often assume that a friend or acquaintance is to blame.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A woman's body is found and investigators have little time and few clues to lead them to a killer who could strike again. Perpetrators try to conceal their crimes, yet savvy investigators can take the most obscure data and recreate a murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hairs and Fibers: The tiniest filament can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways. Investigators have come to rely on forensic evidence as fine as a carpet fiber or as innocent as an eyelash to crack difficult cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: These cases took a decade or more to solve. There's no statute of limitations on murder. As a case turns cold, the clues become scarce, investigators must rely on science to close cold cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators rely on forensic odontology to identify a body from a single tooth and to catch two brutal killers from their bite marks.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A teenager is abducted on a shopping trip. Two hikers disappear from the Appalachian Trail.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Solving crimes may begin with gut intuition, but advanced science provides investigators with irrefutable proof. When criminals go to great lengths to mask their crimes, Investigators must step up the challenge and remain forever …undaunted.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some of the best clues come from the least likely places. Baffling crimes have been solved and criminals betrayed through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles, and other seemingly meaningless objects.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder…at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their capture.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man is terrified of falling asleep for fear he might die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In 1942, a German wonders why he's on the deck of a British steamship, with no memory of how he got there, and an overwhelming sense of impending doom.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts have returned from this first space flight. Major Gart is hospitalized with a broken leg. The other two, Colonels Harrington and Forbes head for a bar. Harrington gets a strange feeling…

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A two-bit thug thinks he's found the key to a better life in an old sidewalk salesman who has the uncanny ability to tell people what they need the most.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man who can change his face to resemble others gets into hot water with gangsters.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: With all-out nuclear war about to ignite, a scientist and his pilot friend plot to escape on an experimental spaceship.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts crash on what they believe to be an asteroid. Unfortunately they have only limited water supplies to sustain them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Alone on a cross-country trip, a woman continually sees the same hitch-hiker everywhere she looks.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Tight fisted Franklin Gibbs is not pleased when his wife wins a trip for two to Las Vegas. But things change when he falls under the spell of a slot machine that calls his name.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A World War I flying ace flies through a mysterious cloud - and lands at a modern U.S. air base in the year 1959!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Lt. Fitzgerald has found his own special wartime hell. Looking into the faces of his men prior to battle, he has the disquieting ability to see who is about to die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts land on what looks like Earth 200 years before they left--only all of the people seem frozen in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Millicent Barnes sees her double at a bus terminal.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Paranoia strikes the residents of Maple Street when they believe human-looking aliens have invaded the neighborhood.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Businessman Arthur Curtis discovers that life as he knows it doesn't really exist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Walter Jameson is an excellent history teacher who talks about the past as if he had lived it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a space exploration crashes on Mars, the surviving passenger is surprised to find that Martians are human-looking, very friendly and apparently just like us...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Just before being hanged for shooting a man in the back, a man in 1880 is transported into the year 1959 by a professor who soon realizes that he has brought forward a savage killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After being shot to death, Rocky Valentine encounters the amiable white-haired Mr. Pip, who gives Rocky everything he wishes for.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Riding home on the train one day, a man falls asleep and dreams it is 1880, and he is entering a small town called Willoughby.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An eccentric loser gets a new life from his guardian angel, but there is a price to keeping it.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Las diferencias entre Rick y Shane por el liderato del grupo y la gestión de la granja se intensifican cuando Shane decide por su cuenta el destino de Randall. La tensión termina estallando y los dos amigos se enfrentan a muerte.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Una horda de zombis invade la granja y el grupo intenta escapar vivo entre el caos, pero no todos lo lograrán. Además, Rick se harta de las quejas del grupo y les da un ultimátum: si quieren que sea el líder, acatarán sus órdenes.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo encuentra refugio en las instalaciones de una prisión federal abandonada tras meses en la carretera. Rick considera que se trata de un lugar seguro para que Lori pase los últimos meses de embarazo, pero quizá se haya equivocado.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick accede a dejar salir de sus celdas a los prisioneros si les ayudan a matar a los zombis que quedan en la prisión. Entretanto, la salud de Hershel empeora por momentos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea y Michonne descubren una comunidad de sobrevivientes liderada por un hombre llamado el Gobernador. Allá les ofrecen medicinas, comida, agua caliente y ropa limpia, pero Michonne desconfía del Gobernador y sus verdaderas intenciones.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En Woodbury, Michonne desconfía del Gobernador y planea irse sin Andrea. En la prisión, un sabotaje provoca que una horda de zombis penetre en la cárcel y, mientras Rick y sus compañeros los combaten, Lori entra en trabajo de parto.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Janibek Alimkhanuly vs Hassan N'Dam N'Jikam
programme.desc: On November 20th, 2021, Janibek Alimkhanuly fought Hassan N'Dam N'Jikam in a middleweight championship bout at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas. Janibek was dominant from the start, scoring a knockdown in round three and stopping N'Jikam in round eight.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Julio Ceasar Gonzalez
programme.desc: On July 28th, 2001 Roy Jones Jr and Julio Ceasar Gonzalez battled for IBA, IBF, IBO, WBA and WBC World Light Heavyweight titles at the Staples Center in Los Angeles resulting in a win for Jones with a unanimous decsion.

programme.title: Janibek Alimkhanuly vs Rob Brant
programme.desc: On June 26th 2021 Janibek Alimkhanuly battled Rob Brant for WBC Continental Americas middleweight title at the Virgin Hotels in Las Vegas with Brant going down in round 6 Alimkhanuly secured the victory in the eighth round.

programme.title: James Toney vs Tim Littles

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle

programme.title: Chrissy & Mr. Jones

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Nicole sets Mayte up on her first blind date, which stresses Mayte out. Meanwhile, Jessica breaks the news about Jose to Josie and then is shocked to learn that Josie is planning a visit to Planned Parenthood.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Tony sets Andrea up on a date with a local friend, but she worries how he will react when he finds out that R. Kelly is her ex. Meanwhile, Mayte plans a big party for her mother's birthday.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Controversy erupts during a weekend getaway to Palm Springs after Jessica accuses the others of being hypocrites. Not one to take it lightly, Sheree calls Jessica out.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Back in L.A., resentments are still simmering after the altercation in Palm Springs. Mayte, who receives bad news from a fertility expert, is especially sensitive and confronts Jessica during a ladies night out.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: The ladies take sides after the confrontation between Mayte and Jessica. Meanwhile, Andrea starts to feel pressure from Percy and worries that their relationship is moving too quickly.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Mayte and Jessica attempt to repair their damaged relationship. Meanwhile, Sheree pitches her skin product, Whoop-Ash, to a trendy Hollywood boutique and Nicole prepares a public showing of her new clothing line.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: In this dramatic season finale, the ladies rehearse a number for Andrea's upcoming dance benefit, during which one of them has a serious and painful accident. With less than an hour before showtime, an ambulance is called...

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: In the season two premiere, Drea plans to confront Jessica about a comment she recently tweeted. Meanwhile, Jessica struggles to find a balance between her new boyfriend and Jose. Mayte announces big baby news to the group.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Jessica expresses her concerns to Mayte about her adoption plans, which Mayte shares with Drea, who becomes increasingly annoyed with Jessica and plans to confront her.

programme.title: Origins of WOW
programme.desc: This documentary explores the hardscrabble journey of women wrestlers,from early 20th century carnival sideshows and the male dominated world of professional wrestling,to the ultimate creation of the only all-female wrestling league in the 21st century.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Women Of Wrestling kicks off with the world champion The Beast, the biggest and the baddest phenom of wrestling, as she battles against the number one contender, New Jersey's own Adriana Gambino.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: On WOW - Women Of Wrestling, you never know who's going to show up! She's fresh, fly and funktastic — Foxxy Fierce makes her in-ring debut against the cold-hearted dissidentIce Cold — and that's only the tip of the iceberg!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The tag team tournament is underway in a big way as the Monsters of Darkness Siren the Voodoo Doll & Chainsaw battle it out against fan favorites The Bully Busters, Keta Rush & Stephy Slays!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: WOW World Champion The Beast puts her title on the line against the World's Greatest Attorney Sophia Lopez's newest client, Mexican luchador sensation Tormenta!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In a Triple Threat Main Event, WOW World Champion The Beast goes head-to-head-to-head with the Queen of Kings, Reina Del Rey and luchador extraordinaire Tormenta.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In a battle against the odds, the Tonga Twins take on all three of the Heavy Metal Sisters – will the sisters be victorious or, despite being outnumbered, will the Tonga Twins win?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Women Of Wrestling is serving up action-packed tag team action as the Fashionista Family Adrianna Gambino & Gigi Gianni face off against the fiery duo of Miami Sweet Heat, Laurie and Lindsey Carlson.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Women Of Wrestling when rap superstar BK Rhythm clashes with dancing queen Chantilly Chella! In tag team action we'll see if the light of Kandi Krush & Keta Rush can overcome the darkness of Siren The Voodoo Doll & Chainsaw!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Women Of Wrestling is ready to explode through your TV with a double dose of twin-tastic action, as the Tonga Twins lock up against the devilishly dangerous Miami Sweet Heat in the Tag Team Tournament Finals!

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Following an Indian attack on their stagecoach that kills his prisoner, Randall and an eastern gentleman unaccustomed to the ways of the West must trek to safety across many long, hot miles of hostile Apache territory.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: On Christmas, Eve Randall receives his most daunting assignment yet from a young boy who has eight cents to pay: bring in Santa Claus.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Thieves are lying in wait to ambush mail carriers and eventually Josh is hired to help ensure that the mail will get through.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is knocked out by a posse who wants his prisoner who is wanted for killing his step-daughter.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh needs to get his wounded prisoner to Bannach in three days to prevent an innocent man from hanging.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh rides into a small town looking for Vic Warsaw but is told by the Sheriff that Warsaw was buried that day and killed by Miss Lucy Fremont the night before.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Four men break out of prison looking for revenge against Aben Starr who turned them in after their first escape attempt.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is resting in Benson when two bounty hunters bring in a man - the mayor - dead.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A grieving father who is the town drunk hires Josh Randall with his last $30 to find his murdered son's body, but Josh's search for clues runs up against a cowardly conspiracy of silence.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: At the request of his friend's wife, Randall comes to assist and protect a war buddy in his bid for the town's mayoralty, quickly running afoul of the established political machine and its corrupt mayor and wanted sheriff.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A bounty hunter is not a hero in his own hometown, as Josh learns when he honors a dying friend's request to return his body to Cameron and the townspeople rush to judgment, believing Josh killed him for the reward money.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is approached by the wife of a wanted man eager to turn himself in peacefully, provided Josh splits the bounty with his wife.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A man with unwavering faith in a legend about lost treasure hires Josh to lead his family on an expedition into the desert to locate the cache of Spanish gold.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When a young runaway is framed for killing a Pinkerton agent, Randall turns detective to uncover the real killer.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is requested to meet a famous singer at the opera house in Denver who has a job for him.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh comes to the aid of his old friend Jesse, who is being strong-armed into selling the Outrider Hotel and Saloon owned by his beautiful girlfriend.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A decidedly different and dangerous assignment awaits Josh when he agrees to go into the Apache camp and compete in their contests to win the hand of a woman.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Pursuing killer Joe Collins into the Superstition Mountains, Josh is followed by a man who believes Collins could be his long-lost son.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A blindly obedient religious cult cast lots and it falls upon a young woman to act as its angel of vengeance.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh receives a letter from a girl at the St.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A concerned father hires Josh to retrieve his son, a passionate young ideologue whose gift for rousing rhetoric is being used by plunderers to recruit freedom fighters.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh's big talk after a dog is shot lands him in big trouble when his browbeating the locals in the saloon about ending the decades-long Carter-Blake feud.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: To track down the cheating tinhorn gambler Johnny Deuce and recover his money, Randall befriends the card sharp's protégé, a 12-year-old orphan boy and card cheat, nicknamed The Montana Kid.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh embarks on a mission of mercy when he pleads with the parents of a boy with appendicitis to let the doctor operate.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bart wagers to save the lives of his fellow stagecoach travelers--who dislike gamblers--when the coach is held up and Bart makes an unusual bet with the bandits.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: When a man claiming to be a leprechaun promises Bart five wishes, Bart is surprised when the first wish comes true. But the money the "leprechaun" grants turns out to be stolen.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: When Bart's poker winnings include partial ownership of a casino, blackmail is part of the pot, and he starts to believe that murder may be the final payout for life as a gambler.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bart wins a newspaper in a poker game, only to discover that the paper is being sued by a powerful senator for libel.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: The World's Fastest Gun,' Billy Denver, comes to Tombstone to perform. Challenged by Johnny's Pearce, he faces his first human target - and kills him. When Johnny's brother hears the news, he heads for Tombstone to avenge his brother's death.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Elias Ransome brings his band of religious emigrants to the outskirts of Tombstone, but a prejudiced rancher stirs up agitation against the newcomers, leading to an air of intolerance. Hollister and Clabourne must step in to resolve the situation.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: A gunslinger en route to Durango seeks Doc Holliday to gun him down for the murder of his brother. Passing through Tombstone, he becomes the enemy of two of the West's slickest draws -- Sheriff Hollister and the infamous dentist-turned-gunman.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: A handsome cowboy makes eyes at an immigrant miner's pretty daughter and upsets her staid European ideals. Betrothed by her father to a young miner, she forsakes him and her old-world traditions by leaving home to become an 'American lady.'

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: George and Patricia Camden, two people out of rancher Aaron McClain's shady past, blackmail him. Aided by a mysterious accomplice, McClain evens the score by murdering George, and Sheriff Hollister is plunged into a dangerous manhunt.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Old Man Clinton forces Bill Doolin - just out of prison - into an attempt to kill Sheriff Clay Hollister as Clay is the only witness against his two renegade sons. Dooline picks a fight with Clay who risks his life to get to the bottom of the plot.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Julie Dixon takes a job as a dealer in Tombstone's Saloon. Here, she deals a grim hand of vengeance. Her brother Sam, an incurable gambler, had killed Julie's lover six months before. She has taken the job as part of a plan to wreak revenge on Sam.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Convicted of murder, Vince Harper breaks jail and seeks refuge with an old friend: Editor Claibourne. Believing in Harper's innocence, the editor agrees to hide him until he can uncover new evidence, leading Sheriff Hollister to strike a deal.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Due to the trouble in Arizona, the new governor has decided on a shoot-to-kill order and uses vigilantes to stop the lawlessness.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Old Man Clanton threatens Behan with replacement unless he stops Earp from rousting his men in Tombstone.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Morgan Earp has been helping Wyatt for a month but Morgan's interest in drinking, women, and hanging with Doc Holliday bothers Wyatt.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Ned Buntline returns to Tombstone to interview widow Amy Jones. She is after money to get out of Tombstone so when Buntline has no money she tries other means, including framing Earp.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Odie Cairns learns that a couple who are True Lighters are moving into the Tombstone area. Odie takes it upon himself to drive the couple out of town which Earp must stop.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Marshal Pritchard is severely wounded in front of Doc Goodfellow. Doc tells Earp that he believes the shooter may be mentally unstable and not responsible for his actions.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: A man is found murdered in a stable but the weapon used is unique. The primary suspect appears to be the fiancée of the dead man's daughter.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: In honor of the 20th anniversary of the World Poker Tour WPT presents a very special episode featuring the greatest moments in WPT poker history over the past 20 seasons.

programme.title: WPT Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown 2023 - Part 1
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour returns for a historic 20th season. This season kicks off with the Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown where six players remain in the battle for the top prize of $1 million dollars.

programme.title: WPT Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown 2023 - Part 2
programme.desc: The WPT Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown resumes as five players remain from the massive starting field of 2010 entrants. Darren Elias and Mark Davis lead the final five in this heated battle for $1 million dollars.

programme.title: WPT Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown 2023 - Part 3
programme.desc: The fight for $1 million dollars continues as three players remain at the WPT Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown Final Table. Each player is now guaranteed a minimum third place prize of $490,000.

programme.title: WPT Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown 2023 - Part 4
programme.desc: And then there were two! Prepare for a roller coaster heads up battle as we bring you the conclusion of the WPT Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown. A starting field of 2010 entrants has narrowed to the final two.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Choctaw 2023 - Part 1
programme.desc: From HyperX Arena in Las Vegas, Nevada it's the WPT Choctaw Final Table where the final six players are competing for the top prize of $486,600 and the title of WPT Champion.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Choctaw 2023 - Part 2
programme.desc: Four players remain in the battle for WPT Choctaw Champion. Steve "Cuz" Buckner is fired up and determined to find a way to win his first WPT Title. He is breaking out big bluffs backed by some big talk in hopes of outwitting his final three opponents.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Choctaw 2023 - Part 3
programme.desc: The fight for first continues at HyperX Arena in Las Vegas, Nevada as our four remaining players hope to become a WPT Champion and leave with the first place prize of $486,600.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Choctaw 2023 - Part 4
programme.desc: Two players remain, but only one can claim the title of WPT Choctaw Champion. Both Chance Kornuth and Steve "Cuz" Buckner begin this heads up match with nearly even stacks in what promises to be an epic battle.

programme.title: WPT Ladies Championship 2023 - Part 1
programme.desc: The Final Table of the first ever WPT Ladies Championship at Wynn Las Vegas is set. Kathy Liebert, Jamie Kerstetter, Olga Iermolcheva, Lina Niu, Cindy Spier, and Dusti Smith round out our final six.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Six talented poker competitors remain in the first ever WPT Ladies Championship. Lina Niu has the chip lead, but Olga Iermolcheva is right on her heels. Tension is rising as the short stacks are being forced to make their move to stay alive.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Ladies Championship 2023 - Part 3
programme.desc: One of poker's top female earners of all time, Kathy Leibert finds herself as the shortest stack at the table with only four women remaining.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Ladies Championship 2023 - Part 4
programme.desc: Only three ladies remain in the battle for over $100,000 and the title of WPT Ladies Champion. Olga Iermolcheva has a commanding chip lead, but her competitors are showing no signs of backing down.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The hope of mankind rests on Yugi's shoulders as he arrives at the final temple chamber where the Pharaoh's name is located, but something unexpected is waiting for them - a sinister surprise that can cost them their lives!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After a nearly eternal slumber, the all-powerful Zorc has resurrected, plunging the world into darkness!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and his guardians are down to their last line of defense as Shada falls victim to Zorc. The Pharaoh desperately wants to summon the three Egyptian Gods, but he can't without his Millennium Puzzle!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Exodia the Forbidden One couldn't defeat Zorc! Exodia was able to buy enough time for the Pharaoh to get his Millennium Puzzle back-he can now summon the almighty Egyptian Gods! It's time for the Pharaoh's counterattack in the biggest brawl.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The three Egyptian Gods have been defeated. The Pharaoh is severely hurt and unable to stop Zorc from setting fire to the city, but our heroes aren't giving up. It's not double vision when Seto and Kaiba transcend time to confront Zorc.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and Kaiba's combined strength couldn't defeat Zorc. Yugi must give the Pharaoh his name, but Yugi doesn't know how to read ancient Egyptian text. All bets are off in the final clash where Yugi must protect the past to save the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pharaoh Atem, Yugi, and friends have defeated the bandit Bakura and Zorc, but the final test still awaits! Yugi must duel Atem! As they set sail to the final dueling grounds, everyone realizes this may be the final night Yugi and Atem have together.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: If Yugi defeats Atem, Yugi will prove he's ready to stand on his own, and Atem can join his friends in the world beyond. But Yugi and Atem will be separated forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Atem has summoned all three Egyptian Gods! What chance does Yugi have against these powerful creatures that no one has been able to defeat? Yugi better think of a strategy quickly or this duel will be over soon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Atem still has all three Egyptian God Cards, Yugi doesn't have a single monster on the field! Yugi claims that he has a combo that will defeat the Egyptian Gods, but is he simply bragging, or does he actually have a plan?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Atem - more than friends, closer than brothers. Will they stay together, or is it time to say goodbye? It's the final answer, the final duel, and the final time we will see our friends in the rousing conclusion to Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: When the #1 ranked duelist and ruthless tycoon, Seto Kaiba, kidnaps Yugi's Grandpa to get the rare Blue-Eyes White Dragon card, Yugi must face Kaiba in the ultimate Duel Monsters showdown!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is forced to face Duel Monsters creator, Maximillion Pegasus, in the mysterious Shadow Realm where all the monsters and magic are real. If Yugi loses, Pegasus claims Grandpa's soul as his prize!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi gives up one of his own Star Chips so Joey can board the boat bound for Duelist Kingdom and duel to save his sister's eyesight. Meanwhile, the cheat Weevil tries to cripple Yugi's deck by tossing his best cards overboard!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pegasus announces that there are many strange secrets that will make his ultimate tournament unlike any they've ever had. Yugi must not only figure the rules out, but master them if he's to survive!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After Yugi defeats Weevil's first wave of Duel Monsters, he's shocked to discover that Weevil has one last trick up his sleeve; a ravenous Great Moth that grows in power with every turn!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey finds himself courageously accepting a challenge from veteran duelist, Mai. But when Mai begins to demonstrate an unnerving psychic ability, Joey has to figure out Mai's secret strategy before falling victim to it!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The fisherman duelist baits Yugi into a duel on his own sea playing field for a home-field advantage. Can Yugi adapt to these new settings to turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: If Yugi is eliminated from the tournament, KaibaCorp's crooked Board of Directors will transfer control of the company from Kaiba to Pegasus! Kaiba's brother Mokuba challenges Yugi to a duel to protect his brother's company!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi must duel a magical doppelganger of Kaiba, created from the greed and power lust Yugi wiped from Kaiba's soul.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi defeats the Blue Eyes White Dragon, but there are two more waiting in the wings! Will the real Kaiba reach Yugi in time to help beat this impersonator?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey decides to battle Rex Raptor without his friends' help to prove that he is man enough to take care of Serenity on his own.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey duels valiantly, but Rex Raptor has unleashed his secret weapon: the Red-Eyes Black Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's classmate Bakura, possessed by his Millennium Ring's dark powers, traps Yugi and friends in a Shadow Game where they become the cards themselves!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pegasus's hired duelist Panik cheats Mai of all her star chips, and Yugi vows to defeat him and win them back. But when Panik's Castle of Dark Illusions enshrouds his monsters in a black mist, how can Yugi defeat an enemy he cannot see?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Despite his astonishing disadvantage, Yugi boldly provokes Panik - "I'll finish you in three turns." Is Yugi bluffing, or does he have the advantage in this battle of wits?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba descends to the kingdom to face Pegasus. Has Kaiba changed since his battle with Yugi, or is he still the same merciless duelist? A battle between Kaiba's Blue Eyes White Dragon and Joey's Red Eyes Black Dragon holds the answers!
